title: Medical Social Worker
description:
You will be posted to Vanguard Care Home @ Senja / Woodlands.


This Medical Social Work (MSW) will provide psycho-social assessment, social work intervention and support to residents and their families to resolve personal, social, emotional, and financial issues. The role involves facilitating residents to benefit from comprehensive health and social services that help to reduce the burden on them and their families.


Job Responsibilities

MSW works with the Nurse Manager, Rehab Manager, and Ops Team to facilitate resident admissions and to ensure the appropriate support is provided to our residents.

  • Attend multi-disciplinary meetings with medical staff, nurses, and other healthcare professionals to discuss, propose, and coordinate care plans for residents.
  • Design and develop relevant programmes on psycho-socio care that promote quality care that look at well-being of residents.
  • Counsel resident and their family members on psycho-socio care plans
  • Liaise with organisations that provide services to meet residents' and their families needs and refer them to community support organisations if necessary.
  • Focus on family-centred care by encouraging participation among residents' family members.
  • Active participation in visiting residents at wards and join organization/residents' related events.
  • Identify gaps and streamline work processes within organization and service deliveries related to care and needs of residents and families.
  • Advocate for changes with relevant stakeholders to enhance the care and well-being of residents.
  • To keep up to date with the latest government guidelines on healthcare and social service programs, funding schemes available within the community/sector.
  • Develop the ability to work with different levels of internal colleagues to foster close liaison on issues arising and/or feedback related to residents.
  • Participate as part of the Multi-disciplinary Case Assessment Team (MCAT) assessors to conduct residents' pre-admission assessment.
  • Establish and confirm source of social facts shown in the social background of all new applicants.
  • Manage Medifund administration and applications in collaborations with Finance Dept.
  • Administer renewals of residents' funding schemes when needed, e.g. Household means testing, etc. on a timely basis.
  • Develop and monitor the social wellness care plan of residents.
  • Develop discharge care plan for residents if their health condition is fit for discharge.
  • Any other duties as assigned by Reporting Manager/Supervisor.

Requirements:

  • Candidate must possess a Degree in Social Work.
  • At least 1 - 3 years of relevant healthcare industry experience.
  • Pleasant and mature disposition with empathy and patience dealing with residents, next-of-kins, and staff alike.
  • Demonstrate inititative to identify, plan, develop, and implement resourcefulness to find solutions to missing gaps in work processes and mutually benefits stakeholders.

Required Skill(s):

  • Good communication and people engagement skills.
  • Good organisation ability.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
VANGUARD HEALTHCARE PTE. LTD.

Set up by the Ministry of Health and MOH Holdings in 2015, Vanguard Healthcare aim to spread good practices, encourage other players to adopt innovations and enhanced practices and develop their manpower, so as to benefit the overall eldercare sector and boost its development over time. We plan to operate five nursing homes by 2020, with approximately 1,000 beds for patients entitled to medical subsidies.
